text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I totally won! Wahey! Go me!
choice_data_list: Let's keep this up in the next one.
Let's keep this up in the next one.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I totally won! Wahey! Go me!
choice_data_list: Let's keep this up in the next one.
Let's keep this up in the next one.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...Oh wow, we're really on the page. Is your
passion contagious or something? Ewww...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I'm kidding! I don't mind matching your
vibes once in a while. Actually, it's pretty great.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, wanna go and celebrate? We can get
something tasty!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I won, so why are you so serious? It's extra typical
of you. Aren't you happy?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Then just say so. Tell me I did good and then
make me better!
choice_data_list: Next time we'll do even better!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm not talking about next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I deliberately avoid laying the praise on too thick.
Tosen Jordan appears fired up and eager to earn
more compliments next time.
